languages.text: {n}Выдав удивительно длинную тираду, Батошски замолкает и как будто слегка уменьшается в размерах. Всего лишь на мгновение, но вы видите в нем уставшего вождя, а не сурового ветерана.{/n} "Если вам будет спокойнее, я казнил ее лично, глядя в глаза. Тело мы положили в саван-лист, чтобы оно послужило Клети. Она обретет свое последнее искупление для одного. А мы будем жить и помнить ее".

{n}After finishing his unusually long tirade, Batoshski falls silent and seems to deflate slightly. For a fleeting moment, you see in him a weary leader rather than a hardened veteran.{/n} "If it puts your mind at ease, I took her life personally, looking her in the eye. We placed her body in a shroud-leaf so that it may serve the Cage. She will get her atonement for the one. And we will live on and remember her."

We placed her body in a shroud-leaf so that it may serve the Cage. She will get her atonement for the one. And we will live on and remember her."

languages.text: {n}在结束了那番罕见的长篇大论后，巴托什斯基不再说话，整个人似乎也颓然了一些。那一瞬间，你眼中的他不是久经沙场的老兵，而是一位疲惫的头领。{/n}“要是这能让您好受点的话——是我直视着她的眼睛，亲手处决了她。我们把她的遗体放进了裹尸叶，以便让她继续为牢笼效力。她会得到一人之赎。而我们会活下去，并记住她。”
languages.original_text: {n}After finishing his unusually long tirade, Batoshski falls silent and seems to deflate slightly. For a fleeting moment, you see in him a weary leader rather than a hardened veteran.{/n} "If it puts your mind at ease, I took her life personally, looking her in the eye. We placed her body in a shroud-leaf so that it may serve the Cage. She will get her atonement for the one. And we will live on and remember her."

traits.locale_text: {n}在结束了那番罕见的长篇大论后，巴托什斯基不再说话，整个人似乎也颓然了一些。那一瞬间，你眼中的他不是久经沙场的老兵，而是一位疲惫的头领。{/n}“要是这能让您好受点的话——是我直视着她的眼睛，亲手处决了她。我们把她的遗体放进了裹尸叶，以便让她继续为牢笼效力。她会得到一人之赎。而我们会活下去，并记住她。”

languages.text: {n}Alışılmadık derecede uzun olan nutkunu bitirdikten sonra Batoshski sessizleşiyor, biraz sönmüş gibi görünüyor. Kısacık bir an için onda sertleşmiş bir gazi değil, yorgun bir lider görüyorsunuz.{/n} "İçinizi rahatlatacaksa gözünün içine bakarak canını bizzat ben aldım. Cesedini Kafes'e hizmet etmesi için bir kefen yaprağına yerleştirdik. Sona kalana kefaretini ödeyecek. Biz de yaşamaya devam edecek ve onu hatırlayacağız."
languages.original_text: {n}After finishing his unusually long tirade, Batoshski falls silent and seems to deflate slightly. For a fleeting moment, you see in him a weary leader rather than a hardened veteran.{/n} "If it puts your mind at ease, I took her life personally, looking her in the eye. We placed her body in a shroud-leaf so that it may serve the Cage. She will get her atonement for the one. And we will live on and remember her."

Kısacık bir an için onda sertleşmiş bir gazi değil, yorgun bir lider görüyorsunuz.{/n} "İçinizi rahatlatacaksa gözünün içine bakarak canını bizzat ben aldım. Cesedini Kafes'e hizmet etmesi için bir kefen yaprağına yerleştirdik. Sona kalana kefaretini ödeyecek. Biz de yaşamaya devam edecek ve onu hatırlayacağız."

languages.text: {n}Après sa longue tirade, Batoshski se tait et semble se décourager. L'espace d'un instant, vous voyez en lui un colonel méfiant, et non un vétéran aguerri.{/n} « Si cela peut vous réconforter, je l'ai tuée moi-même, en la regardant en face. Nous avons placé sa dépouille dans un linceul de feuilles, afin qu'elle puisse servir la Cage après sa mort. Elle aura droit à son expiation. Nous continuerons à vivre, et elle restera dans les mémoires. »
languages.original_text: {n}After finishing his unusually long tirade, Batoshski falls silent and seems to deflate slightly. For a fleeting moment, you see in him a weary leader rather than a hardened veteran.{/n} "If it puts your mind at ease, I took her life personally, looking her in the eye. We placed her body in a shroud-leaf so that it may serve the Cage. She will get her atonement for the one. And we will live on and remember her."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après sa longue tirade, Batoshski se tait et semble se décourager. L'espace d'un instant, vous voyez en lui un colonel méfiant, et non un vétéran aguerri.{/n} « Si cela peut vous réconforter, je l'ai tuée moi-même, en la regardant en face. Nous avons placé sa dépouille dans un linceul de feuilles, afin qu'elle puisse servir la Cage après sa mort. Elle aura droit à son expiation. Nous continuerons à vivre, et elle restera dans les mémoires. »

languages.text: {n}Tras su peculiarmente larga diatriba, Batoshski se queda en silencio y parece desanimarse ligeramente. Por un momento efímero, ves en él a un líder cansado y no a un veterano impasible.{/n} «Si le tranquiliza saberlo, tomé su vida personalmente, mientras la miraba a los ojos. Colocamos su cuerpo en una hoja sudario para que sirva a la Jaula. Tendrá su expiación a ojos del último. Y los demás seguiremos adelante y la recordaremos».
languages.original_text: {n}After finishing his unusually long tirade, Batoshski falls silent and seems to deflate slightly. For a fleeting moment, you see in him a weary leader rather than a hardened veteran.{/n} "If it puts your mind at ease, I took her life personally, looking her in the eye. We placed her body in a shroud-leaf so that it may serve the Cage. She will get her atonement for the one. And we will live on and remember her."

Por un momento efímero, ves en él a un líder cansado y no a un veterano impasible.{/n} «Si le tranquiliza saberlo, tomé su vida personalmente, mientras la miraba a los ojos. Colocamos su cuerpo en una hoja sudario para que sirva a la Jaula. Tendrá su expiación a ojos del último. Y los demás seguiremos adelante y la recordaremos».

languages.text: {n}Nach seiner ungewohnt langen Tirade verstummt Batoshski und scheint sich etwas zu entspannen. Für einen flüchtigen Moment gleicht er eher einem müden Anführer, als einem kampferprobten Veteran.{/n} Falls es Euch beruhigt, ich habe ihr ins Auge gesehen, als ich sie getötet habe. Wir haben ihre Leiche in ein Schleierblatt gelegt, damit sie dem Käfig dienen kann. Sie wird ihre Sühne für den Einzelnen erhalten. Und wir werden leben und uns an sie erinnern."
languages.original_text: {n}After finishing his unusually long tirade, Batoshski falls silent and seems to deflate slightly. For a fleeting moment, you see in him a weary leader rather than a hardened veteran.{/n} "If it puts your mind at ease, I took her life personally, looking her in the eye. We placed her body in a shroud-leaf so that it may serve the Cage. She will get her atonement for the one. And we will live on and remember her."

Für einen flüchtigen Moment gleicht er eher einem müden Anführer, als einem kampferprobten Veteran.{/n} Falls es Euch beruhigt, ich habe ihr ins Auge gesehen, als ich sie getötet habe. Wir haben ihre Leiche in ein Schleierblatt gelegt, damit sie dem Käfig dienen kann. Sie wird ihre Sühne für den Einzelnen erhalten. Und wir werden leben und uns an sie erinnern."

languages.text: {n}異例なほどの長広舌を終えると、バトシュスキーは口をつぐみ、わずかに萎んだように見える。つかの間、君は彼の中に、歴戦の古強者というより、疲れ果てた指導者の姿を見る。{/n}「気が休まるなら言っておくが、彼女の息の根は、この俺がその目を見据えて自ら止めた。我々は亡骸を経帷子の葉に包み、〈檻〉に捧げた。彼女はあの一件の償いを得るだろう。そして我々は生き続け、彼女を忘れまい。」
languages.original_text: {n}After finishing his unusually long tirade, Batoshski falls silent and seems to deflate slightly. For a fleeting moment, you see in him a weary leader rather than a hardened veteran.{/n} "If it puts your mind at ease, I took her life personally, looking her in the eye. We placed her body in a shroud-leaf so that it may serve the Cage. She will get her atonement for the one. And we will live on and remember her."
